result.stdout:
USAGE: tkt [--help] command [<options>]

COMMANDS:

    list            Get a list of tickets
    new             Create a new ticket
    status          Change the status of an existing ticket
    assign          Assign a ticket to a person or people
    prop            Ticket properties
    comment         Add an attributed comment to a ticket
    configure       Configure Tkt

OPTIONS:

    --help            display this list of options

commands.payload:

COMMANDS:

    list            Get a list of tickets
    new             Create a new ticket
    status          Change the status of an existing ticket
    assign          Assign a ticket to a person or people
    prop            Ticket properties
    comment         Add an attributed comment to a ticket
    configure       Configure Tkt

OPTIONS:

    --help            display this list of options

result.stdout:
USAGE: tkt assign person --item [--help]
Assign a ticket to a person or people

OPTIONS:

    person            Assign the ticket to this person (String)
    --item            The number of the ticket (Int32)
    --help            display this list of options

    --help            display this list of options

result.stdout:
USAGE: tkt comment action [--comment] --item [--help]
Add an attributed comment to a ticket

OPTIONS:

    action            The operation to perform (Add|List)
    --comment         The text of the comment (String)
    --item            The number of the ticket (Int32)
    --help            display this list of options

result.stdout:
USAGE: tkt configure setting [--value] [--help]
Configure Tkt

OPTIONS:

    setting           The setting to in question (DefaultStatus)
    --value           The new value of the setting. (Leave blank to see the value)  (String)
    --help            display this list of options

commands.payload:
USAGE: tkt configure setting [--value] [--help]
Configure Tkt

OPTIONS:

    setting           The setting to in question (DefaultStatus)
    --value           The new value of the setting. (Leave blank to see the value)  (String)
    --help            display this list of options

result.stdout:
USAGE: tkt list [--status] [--user] [--help]
Get a list of tickets

OPTIONS:

    --status          List the tickets for a specific status (String)
    --user            List the tickets for a specific user (default = @me) (String)
    --help            display this list of options

NOTE: When filtering the list suffix with '*' for partial match (e.g. Pete*), or prefix with '-' to exclude (e.g. -Pete)

commands.payload:
USAGE: tkt list [--status] [--user] [--help]
Get a list of tickets

OPTIONS:

    --status          List the tickets for a specific status (String)
    --user            List the tickets for a specific user (default = @me) (String)
    --help            display this list of options

NOTE: When filtering the list suffix with '*' for partial match (e.g. Pete*), or prefix with '-' to exclude (e.g. -Pete)

result.stdout:
USAGE: tkt new template --title [--help]
Create a new ticket

OPTIONS:

    template          The type of ticket to create (String)
    --title           The title of the ticket to create (String)
    --help            display this list of options

result.stdout:
USAGE: tkt prop key [--value] --item [--help]
Ticket properties

OPTIONS:

    key               The key of the property (String)
    --value           The new value of the property (leave out to query) (String)
    --item            The number of the ticket (Int32)
    --help            display this list of options

result.stdout:
USAGE: tkt status status --item [--assign] [--help]
Change the status of an existing ticket

OPTIONS:

    status            The new status of the ticket (String)
    --item            The number of the ticket (Int32)
    --assign          Also change who the ticket is assigned to at the same time (String)
    --help            display this list of options
